reviews.review_title: Made my own song album pic
reviews.review_description: It’s perfect ima going to play this every day

reviews.review_title: So much fun! Blew my mind!
reviews.review_description:
This app is FREE and so easy to use. My attention span is nil so to be able to jump right in and create art with very little instruction was great! 

I spent hours just drawing lines and making shapes. 
Mixed reality allowed me to decorate my room for xmas (virtually of course) to see how I want to do it this year. Then I made a campfire scene at stone henge with moving fire, embers, smoke and lights (etc) as a sort of interactive piece   

When you save your image and then reload it to view it, you will get a Timelapse creation of your scene-minus mistakes, deletions and camera angle changes. 

I honestly could go on all night…. Just get it!

Unfortunately this app gets stuck on the loading screen and doesn't even start. I'm using a Quest 3 with the latest OS as of this review. I tried quitting the app and starting it again but I get stuck on the loading screen. I patiently waited for 5 minutes but nothing. I'll bump up my rating once I can play it and experience it.

developer_response.body:
PLEASE TRY AGAIN OR GET IN TOUCH.

Hi, Can you please try again with the new release? If that still fails can you try switching to the beta ( https://docs.openbrush.app/alternate-and-experimental-builds/open-brush-beta-docs ). And please - instead of a one star review - come and chat to us on Discord and we'll try and solve your problem: https://discord.openbrush.app/

One more question - there's a few permission dialogs that appear when you first run it. You need to say "yes" to all of these. Do you know if you did?

reviews.review_description: Legit amazing. Drawing dioramas, making coke can into a blooming flower in passthrough. This app is amazing. If you have an Oz of creativity this app will tap into it!

crazy that this is so high quality and free. I can finally make my imagination real with 3D art :D. 10/10 recommended if you like to sketch, doodle, paint, or draw.

developer_response.body: One more question - there's a few permission dialogs that appear when you first run it. You need to say "yes" to all of these. Do you know if you did?

This will blow you away!! So intuitive to use, 3D drawing!! You'll spend hours just drawing lines about the space, changing brushes, bigger pen tip, smaller pen tip, zoom in, zoom out, list is endless!! And to top it all off ... ITS FREE!!! What the heck ... FREE I tell ya!! 
Spectacular app!!!
This is probably the best art app I’ve EVER come across! However there is just one thing: How can I take a picture and export it to my vr?
It ok not super good but it was fun

We haven't heard any complaints about startup time; if you'd like to join our discord (discord.openbrush.app), we'll be glad to see if we can help!

One more question - there's a few permission dialogs that appear when you first run it. You need to say "yes" to all of these. Do you know if you did?

Would rate it higher than was available. Literally would rate this app 20/100

Best game for relaxation wow just WOW I love it what the heck I need more games like this... so to the creator make more games like this I love it and you...

I can’t believe this is free. I am no artist, but this makes me feel like one. So simple to use, yet powerful. Dazzling tools to create amazing and immersive scenes, almost effortlessly. This is the future of “art”, and the future is now! Anyone can create with this, and it’s FUN. Big thank you to the devs for this gift to the VR/MR community. This is a 100% MUST HAVE for everyone!

Very cool has plenty of features and is very fun if you want to get started into the world of art❤️ 10/10 love it keep it up devs

reviews.review_title: Could not find a way to exit the app
reviews.review_description: It's great, but I am not able to find a way to exit the APP. I have tried every button, but they didn't work.

developer_response.body: You should be able to use the regular Oculus / Meta button. I've never heard of this not working for anyone...

reviews.review_description:
As of right now the game is at a 1 or less if that was an option because I cannot get past the loading screen..
I have never had this issue, so I’m not sure why this particular game doesn’t want to load.
I’ve had VR since the 1st oculus that required the gaming PC, motion sensors, and all those wonderful wires that required 7 HDMI inputs to run everything haha..
Hopefully this issue will be fixed.

developer_response.body: Hi, sorry for the delay in responding. When on the loading screen, the Quest Menu should open up with a permissions dialog to enable advanced storage permissions. We currently need this permission due to a years-long bug in Meta Quest's OS for file storage. Our only other option would be to risk your files being permanently deleted if you ever uninstalled the app. If you don't see this popup, try pressing the menu button on your right controller.

reviews.review_title: It’s a nice app but really sucks.
reviews.review_description: I have given the app all the permissions it ask for and it works for the first uses. After I power off the goggles and power back on the app does not load and is a blank environment where nothing can be done. I’ve check all the permission and the app has full access. Ive uninstalled and reinstalled with not change. It’s a nice app but really sucks.

developer_response.body: That's strange; we haven't seen it stop working once all required storage permissions have been granted. If you'd like to hop over to our discord (discord.openbrush.app), we'll be happy to see if we can help you!

Are you using the passthrough brush (very experimental still!) or the passthrough environment?

reviews.review_description: At first lunch, it requires access to the entire device memory (not only the shared memory). I cannot see any justifications for granting soo many privileges, and won't definitely put my device at risk

developer_response.body:
I'm going to repost part of a previous reply below - but please - just come and *talk* to us if you've got doubts. We work our butts off on this and we do it on the whole because we love it. We're open and transparent and you can just come and chat. Heck - read the source code if you think there's something sketchy!

It's really disheartening to get comments like this when we have no choice but to use the permissions we use. We're limited by design choices made by Android and Meta.

The storage permissions thing is so we can save and load files inside your Open Brush folder. If we didn't do this then uninstalling and reinstalling the app would delete all your files. This is currently the only way to preserve your files as Quest does not support newer forms of Android storage permissions.

--------------------------------------- 

You can see our privacy policy at https://openbrush.app/privacy-policy.html, but in short, we sell absolutely no data. In fact, we store no data.

Open Brush is Open Source, and you're welcome to review the source code on Github to see exactly what we do, and don't do, with any and all information we get from the platform SDK.

Please feel free to join our discord if you have any other questions!

reviews.review_description: How to animate

developer_response.body: We don't currently support animation but it's something we're very interested in and there's been some preliminary work done. No promises... yet...

reviews.review_description: Openbrush is so magical! I've used a lot of VR art apps but Openbrush will always be my first love...there is just nothing else like being able to paint sparkling glittering things in 3D space in VR. I am so grateful to the Openbrush team for picking up where Tiltbrush left off and adding so many amazing new features. Some of my favorites are being able to import your own skybox image, the ability to import animated glbs, the multi mirror, and the new experimental brushes. I can't wait to see what else the future will bring for OpenBrush!

reviews.review_title: Opens up a way of BE-ing
reviews.review_description:
It's amazing to put people in this world and see how they respond, it's a very powerful transformative app! So much more than 'just a great painting tool'. We host wonderful sessions in this app were people experience a new way of themselves. 

The team is great and really is co-creating with it's users.

reviews.review_title: Welcome to mixed reality space painting
reviews.review_description: Biggest update and expectation now you can paint and draw in your space l🫐🥚🥚. Thank you developers for listening to feedback and updating the app. If we have access to other people’a creation just to view or may be share and edit. It would make the whole experience event better. Thank you

developer_response.body: We're really glad to hear you're enjoying Open Brush! More sharing options will hopefully come with Icosa's web gallery.

reviews.review_description: I cant find a setting to make your drawing hand your left hand

developer_response.body:
UPDATE 2023/04/10: 2.2 has been released, you can now find a button to switch hands in the settings panel, in addition to tapping the base of the controllers together! 

Original message: Tap the base of the controllers together, and it'll switch hands. The current beta (https://docs.openbrush.app/alternate-and-experimental-builds/open-brush-beta-docs) also has a settings icon for switching hands; it'll go in to 2.2. 

I hope this helps; if you have any issues feel free to join our discord at http://discord.icosa.gallery . If there's anything else we can do to help you, feel free to ask!

reviews.review_description: I was expecting something more I guess. I'll stick to drawing on a computer or on Canvas where I don't need to put on a headset.

developer_response.body: We're sorry you feel that way! Our next release will include some sample sketches from top creators to show the level of creativity and detail that's only possible with our application and being able to draw in VR and 3 dimensions, compared to the 2D canvas other desktop programs are limited to. We hope we can win you back! If you have any other suggestions, feel free to join our Discord: https://discord.gg/W7NCEYnEfy . Thanks!

reviews.review_description: Great version of TiltBrush open source and free !

developer_response.body: Thanks, we're proud to be able to offer Tilt Brush as Free Software, with what we humbly submit is a nice list of improvements; see https://docs.openbrush.app/differences-between-open-brush-and-tilt-brush for a list :-)

reviews.review_description: I LOVE THIS!

reviews.review_title: No support for left handed people
reviews.review_description: Looks very cool, and i hope im wrong here, but i can't find the settings for left handed people. Amazing app tho.

developer_response.body: Sorry for the delayed response. You can see our user guide (in progress) at https://docs.openbrush.app/user-guide, but to switch the controllers, simply tap the bases together (not too hard, don't break anything!) and the left and right controllers will switch roles!

reviews.review_title: Mostly working but waiting for a camera
reviews.review_description:
After the update I finally can bring models to sketchfab and Google drive, and getting some models from poly. Now the last piece for removing tilt brush and multibrush from my quest is a camera feature to take pictures. I am still bouncing from tilt brush to multi brush and back to open brush to get the most done. 


Old 3 star review: I was looking for a way to design without a computer and to backup directly in the cloud, as the original tilt brush. I went back to tilt brush on order to keep my pipeline. If open brush gets an update in that direction, I could review my opinion

developer_response.body: Hi there, you can take pictures and GIFs by using the camera function. It's in a different place to the desktop version, you need to click on the ... in the radial menu, then open the labs panel. You will find the camera tool there! Be aware it cannot record video yet, though we would like to add this when we can.

reviews.review_description: I have to tell you Guy's, you have a real winner here. I installed this for my 6 year old Granddaughter who takes to VR like a Duck takes to Water. She LOVES this App. I cannot get her to take off the headset. Congrats for a job well done.

developer_response.body: Thanks, that's great to hear! My 8 year old loves it as well :-)

developer_response.body: Great to hear that you like it, and thanks for the review!

reviews.review_description:
This is such a great game! There are so many cool and amazing features. I spent time making beautiful art only to have it not be able to save 😟 i even made all the accounts I needed and have plenty of soace to store on my vr headset.
It just really sicks because the potential is there its just I cant save.
I saw someone else had written a review saying they couldnt save and im in the same boat. 
I hope you can fix this and then id give it 5 stars

developer_response.body:
Update: 12th Feb 2024
Hi Kelly, we recently released an update 2.4 that asks for additional storage permissions as required by the newest Quest OS. We really aren't sure what caused your original issue as Quest should have requested the correct storage permissions in the first place. Please can you try again? We hope this solves your issue!

ORIGINAL RESPONSE
Hi, If you jump on our Discord we can try and help. I'd need a bit more info - saving works fine for most people.  https://discord.gg/W7NCEYnEfy

reviews.review_title: It is great, easy interface to have fun.
reviews.review_description:
Positive:
- easy interface
- free

Negative:
- no access to a browser so I could try to have something to look at as an example

reviews.review_title: Already better than the original T_brush
reviews.review_description: Great art app!  Still have not figured out how to collaborate, but I'm sure I am just missing something.  5 stars coming once the devs add more brushes lol...

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! At the moment it's a single player experience, but we hope to add multiplayer when we can fit it into our open source ethos! Custom brushes and more will be coming in the next few months!

reviews.review_description: I was thinking about purchasing googles Tiltbrush but didn’t feel like spending 20 bucks when I found openbrush! Its so much fun! One thing that should be added though is a mode where you can click on a stroke and draw attached to it bc it is hard to do it at the same place and not too far forward or backward.

I love this software, it is an extremely versatile tool for digital art even though it is still under development, I particularly believe that this is the definitive tool for digital Victorian painting, the community still needs to mature because few artists take the software to the limit, I believe it has much more potential than it seems, I only wish they would support shooting with an iPhone using the Reality Mixer, for this software this feature is crucial.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! Regarding iPhone & Reality Mixer... we're playing around with some nifty iOS stuff! No ETA yet, but we'll make sure to announce it when it's ready :-)

reviews.review_description:
I love this app! There's no running, no shooting, no ducking, and you get a full on creative experience. 

I'm sure future artists would make fun of my desire to have some more traditional art tools available, but a really fun app that I could see taking off into art classes, 2d and 3d. The future is bright for VR painting.
Thank you for this app. I love the flying mode.  Is there any chance Openbrush will merge with Multibrush?

developer_response.body: Multibrush uses some code that isn't open source. We are hoping to reimplement similar functionality whilst keeping everything open source so that anyone can contribute or build their own custom version.

reviews.review_description: Truly amazing app, and its free 😊. So addictive, its totally amazing. A must have for all you vr nuts out there 😜

developer_response.body: Thanks; speaking personally, Tilt Brush was the app that caused me to fall in love with VR, and being able to bring it to a wider audience is wonderful!

reviews.review_description: add multiple players!!!

developer_response.body: Now that 2.0 is out, Multiplayer support is the top big item on our backlog.
